    "cli": "chessai.chess.bin",
    "arguments": [
        "--seed", "4",
        "--black-team", "agent-timeout",

        "--agent-start-timeout", "0.01",
        "--agent-end-timeout", "0.01",
        "--agent-action-timeout", "0.01",
        "--agent-arg", "black::get_action_wait=0.1",
        "--max-moves", "2"
    ]
}
